info.name: 07-RideNearby
info.description:
Integration test for GET /{driverId}/nearby.
Setup: registers 5 drivers at origin_lat/lon + 5 riders who each do a search from the same origin.
Asserts: nearbyDriverCount >= 4 (other 4 drivers visible to driver1), nearbyCustomerCount >= 5.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Set envType=Local in Local env files; omit / set to 'Master' otherwise.
console.log('[skip] mock-only request on envType=' + envType + ': ' + (pm.info && pm.info.requestName));
// Generate random identifiers ONCE per collection run
function rPhone(prefix) { return prefix + Math.floor(100000000 + Math.random() * 899999999); }
console.log('Generated test identifiers for 5 drivers + 1 rider');
// Derive the driver-location and search-origin GPS points from the active
// Bangalore coordinates. Fixes nearbyCustomerCount always 0 (search wrote demand
// hotspot data under the wrong city's merchantOpCityId) and nearbyDriverCount
// picking up unrelated drivers (LTS geo-radius search isn't city-scoped, so a
// fixed real Bangalore point collided with other Bangalore test data).
console.log('Derived RideNearby GPS points from origin_lat/origin_lon =', oLat, oLon);
